literal: to live in a way that is lavish, ostentatious, or extravagant, enjoying material comforts and pleasures
to obtain one's livelihood or material support from a person, organization, or resource
to have little or no savings and depend on each paycheck to cover expenses
to occupy another person's thoughts persistently and involuntarily
to take up space in another person's thoughts without permission or cost
to experience or pursue an ideal life or long-held aspiration
to survive a dangerous, traumatic, or extreme situation and be able to recount the experience
a state of existence in which a person is alive but deprived of meaningful qualities of life
an emphatic expression meaning the ultimate or most remarkable example of something
a person or thing that provides direct, observable evidence that a statement is true
fully prepared or equipped to face a difficult or dangerous situation
words or phrases chosen for their strong emotional connotations to persuade or bias
a single word that carries strong emotional associations or connotations
a statement or claim that is false, absurd, or worthless
to purchase or acquire a large quantity of something for future use or storage
to spend time lazily or idly, doing little or nothing of consequence
to pass time idly or lazily, avoiding work or activity
a style of joking characterized by crude, coarse, or sexually explicit remarks
to imprison a person for a very long time or indefinitely
a single individual who commits a shooting or assassination acting alone
